title: From MVPs to Mobile Apps: 20+ Real Projects Built With v0, Lovable, Bolt & Replit
author: Agen cy
text:
From MVPs to Mobile Apps: 20+ Real Projects Built With v0, Lovable, Bolt & Replit
What are people actually building with v0/Lovable/Bolt/Replit?
Here are 20+ examples that I found interesting 🧵
(save this + share with your team)
1/
Ivan Zhao reveals that v0 embeds integrate seamlessly into Notion, featuring apps like Grug for straightforward designs and a fun personality test.
2/
Replit showcases AllFly’s impact, helping customers save millions through an app crafted entirely on their platform.
3/
After generating over $1M in value, Jacob Klug distills a powerful playbook for app creation with Lovable into one concise presentation.
4/
Felix Khakame built a basic web app using v0 and Supabase, then transforms it into a mobile version effortlessly via Rocket.
5/
Prajwal Tomar has built 20+ MVPs for clients using this exact system:
Lovable + Cursor/Claude Code + CodeRabbit
6/
God of Prompt converts a Supabase-backed web app from Lovable into a native mobile experience with Rocket, keeping the backend intact.
7/
@0xTommyThomas introduces Holiday Planner via bolt.new, enabling shared trip itineraries complete with voting and link collaboration.
8/
Felix Khakame dives into a Supabase-driven web app on v0 and Lovable, managing groups, bills, and settlements with ease.
9/
@html_tina launches a creative video editor powered by v0 and Vercel, supporting uploads, overlays, filters, and smooth exports.
10/
@ViktorThulin built a to-do app with Replit, @shadcn, and Resend to organize and gamify daily tasks effectively.
11/
MakerThrive rolls out an AI-driven to-do SaaS using v0, xAI, Neon, Stack Auth, Stripe, and Upstash for seamless functionality.
12/
@CodeChaios unveils Potluck AI through Lovable, Supabase, and @GeminiApp, whipping up recipes based on ingredients and user mood.
13/
Matt Palmer breaks down version control in Replit, focusing on branches and merges to preserve progress without setbacks.
14/
Ekemini Samuel creates Boltception on bolt.new, an innovative AI builder that generates websites directly from prompts.
15/
Harsh Solanki generates a polished landing page in Lovable from a single prompt, detailing the journey in a dedicated thread.
16/
@LexLaker develops a prompt helper app with bolt.new for a design challenge, incorporating placeholder data for demonstration.
17/
Muhammad Ayan demonstrates converting a web app from v0 and Lovable into mobile format using Rocket, all on the same Supabase backend.
18/
James Adeniyi brings Wonder AI to life with bolt.new, a tailored travel assistant ready for hosting and real-world use.
19/
@Pranshu_rana_ developed an engaging learning platform for @boundless_xyz entirely within Lovable.
20/
World View engineers a stratospheric platform, rigorously testing every bolt, board, and circuit for top-tier reliability.
21/
Alexander Olssen designs a sleek ROI calculator using Lovable to boost leads for CRO agencies.
22/
Usama Khalid invents a handy tool with Lovable and Cursor to convert screenshots into animated GIFs.
23/
Tahira Rajput built a cool website via bolt.new, packed with animations and interactive features.
24/
Follow Adam Silverman and Agency for everything AI agent-related
Last week’s thread:
